examples.exam_en: She waters the plants every morning.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 매일 아침 식물에 물을 준다.

examples.exam_en: He planted a tree in the backyard.
The artist drew the scene in perspective.
She offered a new perspective on the issue.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 그 문제에 대해 새로운 관점을 제시했다.

examples.exam_en: Please keep your belongings with you at all times.
She packed all her belongings into one bag.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 모든 짐을 가방 하나에 쌌다.

examples.exam_en: He misplaced his confidence in the wrong person.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 잘못된 사람에게 잘못된 신뢰를 보냈다.

examples.exam_en: She often misplaces her keys at home.
The team made a modification to the original plan.
A few simple modifications improved the design greatly.
examples.exam_ko: 몇 가지 간단한 수정이 디자인을 크게 향상시켰다.

examples.exam_en: He tried to minimize his colleague's contribution.
Dean planned to minimize costs by camping on the tour.
examples.exam_ko: 딘은 여행에서 야영을 하여 비용을 최소화할 계획이었다.

examples.exam_en: The damage to the building was minimal.
They completed the project at minimal cost.
The film was praised for its artistic merit.
She was promoted based on her merit.
They used visible markers as a means of identifying trees.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 나무를 식별하는 수단으로 표시물을 사용했다.

examples.exam_en: Email is a quick means of communication.
He used the word in a figurative meaning.
Look up the meaning of the word in the dictionary.
Dogs have a strong sense of smell.
examples.exam_ko: 개는 강한 후각 감각을 가지고 있다.

examples.exam_en: She has a good sense of humor.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 훌륭한 유머 감각을 지니고 있다.

examples.exam_en: A keyboard is a common input device.
Have you inputted the new data yet?
Please provide your input on the new policy.
examples.exam_ko: 새 정책에 대한 의견을 제출해 주세요.

examples.exam_en: She inserted the key into the lock.
He inserted a bookmark between the pages.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 책 페이지 사이에 책갈피를 끼웠다.

examples.exam_en: The innocent child smiled at everyone.
The jury found him innocent of the charges.
examples.exam_ko: 배심원단은 그가 혐의에 대해 무죄라고 판결했다.

examples.exam_en: The government decided to initiate a reform program.
They initiated new employees into their duties.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 신입 직원들에게 업무를 처음 가르쳤다.

examples.exam_en: The government launched an initiative to help exporters.
examples.exam_ko: 정부는 수출업자를 돕기 위한 계획을 시작했다.

examples.exam_en: Mr. Jones took the initiative to start the project.
examples.exam_ko: 존스 씨가 프로젝트를 시작하는 주도권을 잡았다.

examples.exam_en: Local initiatives were documented to develop community programs.
examples.exam_ko: 지역 계획들을 문서화하여 커뮤니티 프로그램을 개발했다.

examples.exam_en: His initiative in politics was strictly limited.
The doctor examined the initial symptoms of the disease.
examples.exam_ko: 의사는 그 질병의 초기 증상을 진찰했다.

examples.exam_en: You must pay an initial fee to join the club.
examples.exam_ko: 클럽에 가입하려면 입회 비용을 내야 한다.

examples.exam_en: The talk was both informative and entertaining.
She gave an informative presentation on climate change.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 기후 변화에 대해 유익한 발표를 했다.

examples.exam_en: He informed me of his decision.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 나에게 그의 결정을 알려 주었다.

examples.exam_en: I informed my friends about the party.
The hall has a seating capacity of 500.
The venue was crowded beyond its capacity.
The building has a maximum capacity of 2,000 people.
